title: Most of the times during 2019-24 regime in Andhra when I heard in villages... "Janalaki dabbulu ekkuva ayyipoyi panulaki kudaa rakunda pothunnaru okkokkadu roju ki 700 lenidhee paniki ravatledhu"

Most of the times during 2019-24 regime in Andhra when I heard in villages... "Janalaki dabbulu ekkuva ayyipoyi panulaki kudaa rakunda pothunnaru okkokkadu roju ki 700 lenidhee paniki ravatledhu"
